mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_summary SET matchQty = #{qty} WHERE uuid = (SELECT source_no FROM purchase_summary P LEFT JOIN bm_barcode_detail B ON P.barcode = B.barcode where P.id = #{id})
mapper.select: SELECT D.* FROM delivery_summary D LEFT JOIN bm_barcode_detail ON source_no = D.uuid WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT D.* FROM delivery_summary D WHERE D.uuid = ( SELECT source_no FROM purchase_summary P LEFT JOIN bm_barcode_detail B ON P.barcode = B.barcode WHERE P.id = #{id} )
SELECT matchQty FROM delivery_summary WHERE uuid = (SELECT source_no FROM purchase_summary P LEFT JOIN bm_barcode_detail B ON P.barcode = B.barcode where P.id = #{id})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_summary WHERE lot_att03 = #{deliveryNumer}
